reviews.comment:
Es un lindo lugar y la gente muy cordial

(Translated by Google)
It's a lovely place and the people are very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNneWNxRGtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio con el peor servicio de la Argentina. Los empleados son de lo peor, tardan años en atender y buscan cualquier excusa para esconderse en el cuarto de playeros que se armaron en el fondo.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station with the worst service in Argentina. The employees are the worst; they take ages to serve customers and look for any excuse to hide in the makeshift attendant room they set up in the back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNmZXYXVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atencion por parte de un playero, que con su mejor cara de perro, a la hora de pagarle no le gusto que pagara con cambio, conozco a muchos playeros de estaciones de servicio y a la gran mayoría me recontra agradecen que les pague con cambio, este el primero que se me queja.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service from a gas station attendant, who, with his best sour face, didn't like that I paid with exact change. I know many gas station attendants and the vast majority are extremely grateful when I pay with exact change; this is the first one who has complained to me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBLWNtQmVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio/combustible ok.
El taller mecánico un desastre. Los tipos que dicen ser mecánicos unos maleducados importantes, Carísimo a pesar de ser socio, mala atención. No lo recomiendo en absoluto.

(Translated by Google)
Gas station/fuel is fine.
The mechanic shop is a disaster. The guys who claim to be mechanics are incredibly rude. It's extremely expensive, even for a member, and the service is terrible. I absolutely do not recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBckx2S2NBEAE
